productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual Red Casual Shoes
description: Designed for the cool and casual thinkers, this canvas shoe from playboy oozes confidence, style and comfort. Slip into these shoes and seize the day with much ease, while the fabric upper keeps you fresh and comfortable and the stylish lugs on the outsole enhance your fashion statement. Upper denim upper for easy maintenance and durability U-shaped carbon rubber toe box and foxing for enhanced protection to the forefoot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Lace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability Synthetic leather overlay at the back collar with brand logo printed for easy wearing of the shoe, durability and style Brand logo printed on the lateral midfoot for absolute style Midsole Cushioned insole with a fabric footbed for all-day sweat-free comfort Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole in red for flexibility and traction in style Brand logo-shaped lugs throughout the outsole for absolute grip and traction on various surfaces
